examples: A grandnephew is almost the same as a grandson; in default of a lawyer one takes a lancer.
His exit would make room for Mr Karunanidhi's son and grandnephew, who may claim the ministry of textiles and the ministry of chemicals and fertiliser.
"It's good to see that Ned will get the funeral he finally deserved in the first place, " says Anthony Griffiths, the outlaw's great-grandnephew.
